column1: #: name: README and Table of Contents
#: description: This is the HEPData space for the ATLAS SUSY EWK three-lepton search.  The full resolution figures can be found at https://atlas.web.cern.ch/Atlas/GROUPS/PHYSICS/PAPERS/SUSY-2019-09/
The full statistical likelihoods have been provided for this analysis. They can be downloaded by clicking on the purple 'Resources' button above and selecting the 'Common Resources' category.
